body: YOU'VE BEEN SELECTED Peter, We just had a very important fundraising meeting to go over our April End-of-Month results, and we noticed that your name was MISSING from the list of donors. Since you've been such a loyal supporter in the past, you were identified as one the few Patriots who the President wanted to extend the deadline for. PERSONAL TRIPLE-MATCH DEADLINE EXTENSION SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com TRIPLE-MATCH: NOT USED NEW DEADLINE: IN 1 HOUR Your support for our movement has never been more important than it is right now. body:

| | | | | |

| Dear Patriot,
In Chapter Two of our series, we will be digging into one of Lisa Scheller's most abhorrent policy positions that she wants to hide from voters.
The truth is that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion. Lying Lisa Scheller has stated that she believes abortion should be legal. Yet during the current campaign she is trying to fool voters by claiming to be "pro-life" because she "supports the Hyde amendment". If I could tell Lying Lisa Scheller one thing it would be this...
You cannot say you believe abortion should be legal and then claim to be Pro-Life. Believing abortion should be legal makes you Pro-Abortion. Period! Being Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion is NOT a Republican value. It is NOT a Conservative value. Above all, it is an inhumane and immoral value. Let me be clear: I will always fight for and defend the lives of the unborn from the moment of conception forward!! That is why I need your support TODAY. We need to stop Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller from becoming the Republican nominee and supporting Rep. Susan Wild's Anti-Life Propaganda!
Can I count on you to contribute $100, $50, or even just $25 today, so we can protect the lives of the unborn?

Liberals like Lisa Scheller are the ones we need to watch out for; the ones who are wolves in sheep clothing masquerading as conservatives. body:

We'll share updates on the battle against COVID-19 and the ongoing federal relief efforts, discuss what needs to be done to safely "re-open" our economy and take your questions.

Chris Van Hollen

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Remembering May 4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
#### _**May 4th, Kent State University -- 50 Years Later**_
Tomorrow marks the 50th anniversary of the day the precious lives of students were taken during the shootings at Kent State University. _\-- Allison Krause, Jeffrey Miller, Sandra Scheuer, William Schroeder --_ So many people had planned to come together this year to honor the lessons of May 4, 1970, and to commemorate the lives lost and students injured. Although Kent State sadly has had to cancel in person memorial events, we hope you will join these virtual events. **Now through May 4th:[Candlelight Vigil ](https://act.myngp.com/el/YiYcmplSaD0m82CiNN9YtVTz8z6q6e-z2VsxuFFZu9E=/vHE3qdUFz_8hi9MZDy1SQiPwtb1paohpPX3HnAk4BsU=)** **May 4th at noon:[50th Annual Commemoration](https://act.myngp.com/el/YiYcmplSaD0m82CiNN9YtVTz8z6q6e-z2VsxuFFZu9E=/HTQEbqf0LqaLd328UbnPaFDZOEb5dpPRMnUgBIhYhSI=)** Additional commemorative experiences include augmented reality apps, a new production of the "May 4 Voices" radio play, the Kent State Shootings Oral History Project, a recounting of the KSU students who met with President Nixon, and the ability to participate in a May 4th research study. All of these and more can be found on [Kent State University's May 4th 50th Commemoration website.](https://act.myngp.com/el/YiYcmplSaD0m82CiNN9YtVTz8z6q6e-z2VsxuFFZu9E=/VRwOOfmYF67jnnrMOG-gx_ZkuUHXH6IUdenHbfzQNyI=) I have been so moved this past year by my visits to the site of the Kent State shootings and am always reminded how fragile life is, how fragile our democracy is, and how important it is that we remain ever-vigilant to stand up for what is right. **We must never forget the lessons history holds for us. ** _Sincerely,_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YiYcmplSaD0m82CiNN9YtVTz8z6q6e-z2VsxuFFZu9E=/VRwOOfmYF67jnnrMOG-gx_ZkuUHXH6IUdenHbfzQNyI=)

name: Cory Booker
subject: We will not just endure this crisis, we shall overcome.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
We'll do it together. |
#
Friends -- Just a few days ago, our country passed 1,000,000 known coronavirus cases. More Americans have now lost their lives in just two months of this pandemic than during the entire Vietnam War. **But if I am sure of one thing, it's that despair will not have the last word.** Across America, there are heroes leading us through the darkness -- providing us all with an undeniable sense of hope. Hospital workers, first responders, grocery store employees, truck drivers, warehouse workers, and so many others who are risking their lives to make sure the spirit of America marches on during these uncertain times. I carry these stories and experiences in my heart every day as I advocate for policies in the Senate that will help our hardest-hit communities heal and recover from the collective trauma we're experiencing. I know how important it is that we adopt and permanently implement policies like a federal livable minimum wage, universal paid family and sick leave, and stronger workplace safety standards. And I won't stop fighting for more cash relief for families hardest hit by this crisis, more support for small businesses, more PPE for essential workers, and more testing for everyone. Difficult days are ahead and there is much more work to be done. But all of us have power in this struggle, and by committing to radical love, tireless and unyielding acts of kindness - big and small - we will get through this. **Together, we will not just endure this crisis -- we shall overcome.** Cory

---

subject: meeting tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend: I'm going over responses from the survey with Reverend Warnock tomorrow morning- but we noticed we're still missing yours.
---
At this moment in history, it's never been more important to elect Democrat leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. That's why we need to elect Reverend Warnock, restore moral leadership to our government and retake Senate control - but we can't do it without you.
We mean it when we say that your voice is critical to shaping our strategy in this must-win race.
**Please, this is important: Can Reverend Warnock count on you to take just 60 seconds now to share your thoughts? We need to hear from another 24 people by midnight.**
Here's the best link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk196-su-nd")**
Thank you for taking the time - your feedback really makes a difference.
Alex Raposo
Deputy Campaign Manager
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock Date: Sun, May 03, 2020
Subject: I need your response, friend

| | |
---
Friend,

Since launching our campaign for U.S. Senate, the momentum behind our fight to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to Washington has been _incredible_.
While my wealthy opponent is pouring millions of her own fortune into this race to try and buy this seat, I'm running a grassroots campaign that puts _your_ interests, _your_ priorities and _your_ concerns front and center.

**That's why I need to hear from you directly. Hello

The weather is warm, Iowa is reopening, and Planting Season 2020 is full steam ahead. You can almost feel June 2 coming fast.

With just 30 days left until this election, I've been putting up 100s of yard signs and barn signs across our district. The momentum our campaign is feeling has been overwhelming. I'm humbled by messages of support from longtime friends and newly inspired supporters.

At this time, I only have ONE question for you: How can you help lead our grassroots campaign to victory?

If you don't have an answer, I can make a few suggestions...

1. Have you voted? Absentee voting started last week and you should have received a request form in the mail. If you didn't, print
this form (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/pdf/absenteeballotapp.pdf?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489) out and mail it to your county auditor. Casting your ballot is the best way to make sure we get the support we need to win on June 2.
ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489)
2. Have a yard/barn sign? To show your support, get ahold of one of our yard signs. They're moving out the door fast so be sure to let us know you want one or have a good spot for a 4x8 sign TODAY.
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489)
3. Have time to call your neighbors? There's no better way to get the word out about our campaign than calling those you know and trust. Let us know below if you're interested in making calls!
CALL YOUR NEIGHBORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489)
4. Have you seen last week's debate? If not, click here (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t=3820s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489) to watch. Please share the link far and wide; it's critical voters know who is looking to represent them. Coming off of a strong showing, I'm confident Iowans will make the right choice in this election. And mark your calendars, there's two more chances to see all the candidates together: over the radio on May 11 in Spencer and on TV with PBS on May 14 in Des Moines.
WATCH THE DEBATE (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t=3820s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to keep telling more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-ag-monopolies-dc-overspending-and-term-limits-with-kvfds-dodger-daily/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489

"Our farmers are in the middle of a monopoly sandwich. On one side, when they buy their inputs, there's four companies that control over three quarters. On the other side, it's the packers. The DOJ could go after these monopolies, which is what they’ve become, but who am I to say that politicians should follow the laws they write?"
https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-honoring-our-veterans-dealing-with-china-and-fiscal-responsibility-with-kwbg/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=f1f09f47a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-f1f09f47a8-25822489

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn is ignoring medical experts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
As Texas begins to reopen, it's crucial that we have widespread testing in place.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d6/7f51f7bc/4fe41b8e/4ef168b7/2032749410/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

As Texas begins to reopen, it's crucial that we have widespread testing in place. But many Texas counties have performed no tests at all so far, and we rank 49th in testing out of all 50 states. And Sen. John Cornyn has been downplaying the need to ramp it up.

He said that "if you don't have any symptoms of the coronavirus, there is not a great reason to get tested." But that's not what medical experts are saying. It's possible to have (and spread!) the virus while experiencing no symptoms, which is why widespread testing is needed to slow transmission and keep communities safe.

**We all want to safely reopen and get back to work, but we have to listen to the advice of medical experts to make sure we can stay open. Unfortunately, Senator Cornyn and his political allies are ignoring advice from medical professionals, which could lead to another shutdown when cases start to rise again.[If you can, will you make a donation to help us beat him in November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d6/7f51f7bc/4fe41b8e/4ef168b6/2032749410/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200503.2nd__1350__&amount=10")**

Unfortunately, this is part of a pattern with Sen. Cornyn. He's spent 20 years in Washington putting his DC bosses ahead of the people of Texas.

In addition to downplaying the need for additional testing, Sen. Cornyn is refusing to oppose a lawsuit that could strike down the Affordable Care Act -- including essential protections for people with pre-existing conditions. That's unacceptable at any time, but _especially_ during a pandemic.

As Texas' next senator, I'll _always_ put the people of this state first. But I'm counting on your help to keep building the campaign we need to win.

**If you can, please pitch in to help us beat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate this November.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
